Name: Cascade Shadow
Description: Controls cascaded shadow map rendering used for large-scale directional shadows. Splits the camera frustum into multiple depth ranges (cascades) to improve shadow quality near the camera while maintaining efficient long-distance shadow coverage.

Fields.Name: Near
Fields.Description: Near clipping distance used as the starting range for cascade shadow calculations.

Fields.Name: Cascade Distance 0 -> 1
Fields.Description: Distance threshold between cascade layer 0 and cascade layer 1.

Fields.Name: Cascade Distance 1 -> 2
Fields.Description: Distance threshold between cascade layer 1 and cascade layer 2.

Fields.Name: Cascade Distance 2 -> 3
Fields.Description: Distance threshold between cascade layer 2 and cascade layer 3.

Fields.Name: Far Fade Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which shadow fading begins for distant geometry.

Fields.Name: Far Fade Distance
Fields.Description: Distance range over which shadows gradually fade out completely.

Fields.Name: Calculation Mode
Fields.Description: Selects the shadow calculation or projection method used for cascade shadow generation.

Fields.Name: Light ID for Shadows
Fields.Description: Specifies which light source is used to generate directional shadow maps.

Fields.ID: 影終了フェード開始距離[m]
Fields.Name: Shadow Fade-out Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance in metres at which shadow fading begins.

Fields.Name: Shadow Fade Distance
Fields.Description: Fade-out range in metres over which shadows disappear completely.

Fields.Name: Z Offset
Fields.Description: Depth offset applied to shadow calculations to reduce shadow acne and self-shadowing artifacts.

Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Z Offset
Fields.Description: Depth offset specifically applied when using Perspective Shadow Mapping (PSM).

Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Fork Clip Auto-Adjust Distance Rate
Fields.Description: Controls automatic far clip distance adjustment scaling used by Perspective Shadow Mapping.

Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Pass Adjustment Parameter
Fields.Description: Adjustment parameter used to tune projection or perspective correction behavior for Perspective Shadow Mapping.

Fields.ID: シャドウボリュームの長さ[m]
Fields.Name: Shadow Volume Length
Fields.Description: Length of the shadow casting volume in metres used for directional shadow projection.

Fields.ID: 深度比較スムージング
Fields.Name: Depth Comparison Smoothing
Fields.Description: Length of the shadow casting volume in metres used for directional shadow projection.

Fields.ID: 影マップ生成時の深度バイアス
Fields.Name: Depth Bias during Shadow Map Generation
Fields.Description: Depth bias applied while rendering shadow maps to reduce precision artifacts and surface acne.

Fields.ID: 影マップ生成時フリップ
Fields.Name: Flip when Generating Shadow Map
Fields.Description: Enables coordinate or projection flipping during shadow map generation to match rendering conventions.

Fields.ID: ピクセルアライメントを行う
Fields.Name: Perform Pixel Alignment
Fields.Description: Aligns cascade shadow projections to pixel boundaries to reduce shimmering and temporal instability during camera movement.

Fields.Name: Cascade Shadow Color
Fields.Description: Color tint applied to cascade shadows, controlling overall shadow coloration.

Fields.ID: ファークリップ自動調整距離レート(PSM用)
Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Fork Clip Auto-Adjust Distance Rate
Fields.Description: Controls automatic adjustment scaling for far clip distance calculations in Perspective Shadow Mapping mode.

Fields.ID: パース調整パラメータ(PSM用)
Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Adjustment Parameters
Fields.Description: Controls perspective correction and projection adjustment behavior used by Perspective Shadow Mapping.
